description: Palette colors ring-rotate: each beat, all modulo-M zones leap one group forward (or backward) with additive pass-over
command: python3 glowup.py play leapfrog --zones 108 --zpb 3 --beat-duration 1.2 --beat-order sequential --brightness 100 --direction forward --kelvin 3500 --m 12 --palette neon --seed 0
